string.text:
A weighty folder with financial statements for the current month, written by Sergeant Lozhkin for Major Zhurov.

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item

A courier delivery package. Sergeant Lozhkin is expecting this. Oddly enough, it has no protection at all against tampering by outsiders.

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item

Portable VHF radio R-002PP.

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item

This PDA is encrypted. A technician might be able to hack it.

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item

This storage device contains a small part of the information Kirillov managed to save from the ISG commander's PDA.

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item

This briefcase contains hard copies of the SSU's investigation into ISG activities.

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item

This voice recorder has been upgraded by Senior Lieutenant Kirillov. It will start recording when it detects a conversation.

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item
